zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira於大約1181年出生在葡萄牙波爾塔利格波爾圖加爾時，她的父親Lorenço Gomes de Macieira47歲，母親Marina Paez de Barvaens16歲。她於1198年10月24日與Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira于大约1181年出生在葡萄牙波爾塔利格波爾圖加爾时，她的父亲Lorenço Gomes de Macieira47岁，母亲Marina Paez de Barvaens16岁。她于1198年10月24日与Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Lourenço
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Fernando, Abilio, Mario, Albino, Armando, Luis, Luiz, Adalberto.  Portuguese Joaquim, Joao, Adauto, Anabela, Duarte, Goncalo, Leao, Paulo, Valentim.
Portuguese (Lourenço): from the personal name Lourenço, Latin Laurentius (see Lawrence ).

variants.name: Lawrence
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Lorens, Laurence, from Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’, a place in Italy probably named from its laurels or bay trees. The name was borne by a Christian saint who was martyred at Rome in the 3rd century AD ; he enjoyed a considerable cult throughout Europe, with consequent popularity of the personal name (French Laurent, Italian, Spanish Lorenzo, Catalan Llorenç, Portuguese Lourenço, German Laurenz, Polish Wawrzyniec, etc.). In Britain this is a common name from the 12th century, with pet forms such as Law , Low , Lawrie , Laurie , Larry , Larkin , all of which are represented in surnames. There was also a feminine form Laurencia which may have given rise to the English surname. The surname is also borne by Jews among whom it is presumably an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Ashkenazic surnames. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. German Lorenz , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Slovenian Lavrenčič and Lovrenčič (patronymics from Lavrencij and Lovrenc, equivalents of Lawrence), Polish Wawrzyniak . Compare Larrance , Laurence , Lawerence , Lieurance , and Lowrance .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maceira
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician and Portuguese: topographic name from maceira (derivative of mazá or maçá ‘apple’, with the locative suffix –eira), denoting a place where there was a single apple tree.

variants.name: Macera
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Pasco, Alfonso, Angelo, Antonio, Giuseppe, Pasquale, Armando, Basilio, Carmine, Cosmo, Dario, Modesto, Nunzio, Pietro, Ricci, Rosaria.
Italian (southern): topographic name from macera ‘dry-stone wall, pile of stones (collected from cultivated land), stone ruins’.
Spanish: in some cases, possibly also a habitational name from La Macera in Cáceres province.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira was born about 1181, in Portugal, Portalegre, Portugal, her father, Lorenço Gomes de Macieira, was 47 and her mother, Marina Paez de Barvaens, was 16. She married Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha on 24 October 1198. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira est née environ 1181, à Portugal, Portalegre, Portugal, son père, Lorenço Gomes de Macieira, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Marina Paez de Barvaens, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha le 24 octobre 1198. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira um 1181 in Portugal, Portalegre, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lorenço Gomes de Macieira 47 und ihre Mutter Marina Paez de Barvaens 16. Sie hat am 24. Oktober 1198 Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira è nata il circa 1181 nel Portugal, Portalegre, Portogallo, sua padre, Lorenço Gomes de Macieira, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Marina Paez de Barvaens, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha il 24 ottobre 1198. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceiraが約1181年にポルトガルポルタレグアポルトゥガルで生まれた時，父Lorenço Gomes de Macieiraは47歳，母Marina Paez de Barvaensは16歳であった。1198年10月24日にLourenço Fernandes da Cunhaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira(이)가 대략 1181년 포르투갈 포탤그르 포투걸에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lorenço Gomes de Macieira(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marina Paez de Barvaens(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1198년 10월 24일 Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal
historicEvents.description: Portugal is one of the oldest nations in Europe having established its continental frontier as it is set today in 1297

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira nasceu aproximadamente 1181, em Portugal, Portalegre, Portugal, seu pai, Lorenço Gomes de Macieira, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Marina Paez de Barvaens, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha em 24 de outubro de 1198. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira родилась около 1181 г. в местности португаль, портеилегр, Португалия, её отцу по имени Lorenço Gomes de Macieira было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Marina Paez de Barvaens, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha 24 октября 1198 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira nació aproximadamente 1181, en Portugal, Portalegre, Portugal, su papá, Lorenço Gomes de Macieira, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Marina Paez de Barvaens, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha el 24 de octubre de 1198. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas.
